name: Tulsi
uses: Boosts immunity, treats cold, cough, fever, stress. Acts as adaptogen and antibacterial agent. Useful in respiratory disorders and skin diseases.
description: Preparation Method: Fresh leaf juice, decoction (kadha), powder, essential oil. Consume 10-15 fresh leaves daily or boil in water with honey.

name: Ashwagandha
uses: Reduces anxiety and stress, improves energy, stamina and concentration. Used in managing inflammation and arthritis pain. Enhances male fertility.
description: Preparation Method: Root powder (churna) mixed with warm milk and honey. Available as capsules and extracts. 3-6 g powder per day recommended.

name: Neem
uses: Treats skin diseases, acne, eczema, and fungal infections. Acts as natural insecticide and antiseptic. Purifies blood and improves liver function.
description: Preparation Method: Leaf paste for topical use, decoction for drinking, neem oil for external application. Neem twigs used as dental cleanser.

name: Turmeric
uses: Powerful anti-inflammatory and antioxidant. Helps in joint pain, arthritis, digestive problems, and wound healing. Curcumin shown to reduce cancer risk.
description: Preparation Method: Golden milk (turmeric+milk+pepper), spice in food, curcumin supplements. 1 tsp powder in warm milk daily.

name: Aloe Vera
uses: Treats burns, skin irritation, acne, and wounds. Improves digestion and relieves constipation. Lowers blood sugar in diabetics.
description: Preparation Method: Fresh gel applied topically. Juice consumed orally (30 ml daily). Available as cream, lotion, and supplement capsules.

name: Giloy
uses: Potent immunomodulator and anti-pyretic. Treats chronic fever, dengue, malaria. Reduces blood sugar and uric acid. Detoxifies the body.
description: Preparation Method: Stem decoction or juice (20-30 ml). Powder with honey. Giloy kadha boiled with tulsi for fever management.

name: Shatavari
uses: Supports female reproductive health, enhances lactation, balances hormones. Boosts immunity and digestion. Acts as adaptogen and anti-stress agent.
description: Preparation Method: Root powder with warm milk and ghee. Syrup or tablet form available. 3-5 g powder twice daily.

name: Brahmi
uses: Enhances memory and cognitive function. Reduces anxiety, depression and mental fatigue. Treats epilepsy and neurological disorders. Used in ADHD management.
description: Preparation Method: Fresh juice (10 ml), powder with honey, brahmi ghee, or capsules. Brahmi oil for scalp massage to boost memory.

name: Karela
uses: Excellent hypoglycaemic agent - controls blood sugar in Type 2 diabetes. Treats skin diseases, liver problems, and parasitic infections. Boosts immunity.
description: Preparation Method: Raw fruit juice (50-100 ml on empty stomach), cooked as vegetable, capsule extract. 3 to 4 times weekly.

name: Arjuna
uses: Strengthens heart muscles, treats hypertension, angina, and congestive heart failure. Anti-inflammatory and astringent properties. Useful in respiratory disorders.
description: Preparation Method: Bark decoction boiled in milk (Arjuna Ksheerapaka). Bark powder 3-5 g with honey or warm water twice daily.
